description: The macOS menu-bar popover webview (B1b): it may call our app commands (list_sheds / approvals_list / gate_namespaces / approval_decide / ui_report + open_dashboard / open_preferences / app_exit) and listen for Rust-emitted events (approvals-changed / connected-changed / refresh / popover-refresh). App-defined commands need no extra ACL; only core + event access is granted, scoped to the `popover` window (least privilege — it does NOT share `main`'s capability).
